title: Device Request - Tuya Curtain Motor - _TZE204_r0jdjrvi / TS0601
excerpt:
### Prerequisites:
- Before requesting a device addition, please ensure there is not already a request for the device among the open issues.
- Make sure your Homey is upgraded to firmware v5 or higher.
- You need a physical example of the device.

### Device Information
- Device Name: `Tuya Zigbee Curtain Motor`
- Device Model: `TS0601`
- Device Description: `Zigbee curtain/blind motor. TZE204 variant of the already-supported _TZE200_r0jdjrvi — cluster structure is identical, only the manufacturer prefix differs. Adding this manufacturerName to the existing curtain motor driver should be sufficient.`
- Link to device image: [AliExpress](https://www.aliexpress.com/item/1005003792851927.html?spm=a2g0o.order_list.order_list_main.5.58081802T2Q329)

### Device Interview
```json
{
  "ids": {
    "modelId": "TS0601",
    "manufacturerName": "_TZE204_r0jdjrvi"
  },
  "endpoints": {
    "ieeeAddress": "a4:c1:38:5e:b2:9f:0f:ec",
    "networkAddress": 12527,
    "modelId": "TS0601",
    "manufacturerName": "_TZE204_r0jdjrvi",
    "endpointDescriptors": [
      {
        "status": "SUCCESS",
        "nwkAddrOfInterest": 12527,
        "_reserved": 20,
        "endpointId": 1,
        "applicationProfileId": 260,
        "applicationDeviceId": 81,
        "applicationDeviceVersion": 0,
        "_reserved1": 1,
        "inputClusters": [4, 5, 61184, 0],
        "outputClusters": [25, 10]
      },
      {
        "status": "SUCCESS",
        "nwkAddrOfInterest": 12527,
        "_reserved": 10,
        "endpointId": 242,
        "applicationProfileId": 41440,
        "applicationDeviceId": 97,
        "applicationDeviceVersion": 0,
        "_reserved1": 0,
        "inputClusters": [],
        "outputClusters": [33]
      }
    ],
    "deviceType": "router",
    "receiveWhenIdle": true,
    "capabilities": {
      "alternatePANCoordinator": false,
      "deviceType": true,
      "powerSourceMains": true,
      "receiveWhenIdle": true,
      "security": false,
      "allocateAddress": true
    }
  }
}
```

### Additional Comments:
The device _TZE200_r0jdjrvi / TS0601 is already supported in the app. This is the TZE204 variant with identical cluster structure and behavior. Should only require adding the new manufacturerName fingerprint to the existing curtain motor driver.

Purchase link: https://www.aliexpress.com/item/1005003792851927.html?spm=a2g0o.order_list.order_list_main.5.58081802T2Q329
aiAnalysis:
Here is the structured device information extracted from the GitHub issue:

## Device Request Summary

| Field | Value |
|-------|-------|
| **Device Name** | Tuya Zigbee Curtain Motor |
| **Model ID** | TS0601 |
| **Manufacturer Name** | `_TZE204_r0jdjrvi` |
| **Device Type** | Curtain/Blind Motor |
| **Request Type** | Fingerprint Addition (New variant of existing device) |

## Fingerprint Details

| Property | Value |
|----------|-------|
| `manufacturerName` | `_TZE204_r0jdjrvi` |
| `productId` | `TS0601` |
| **Existing FP** | `_TZE200_r0jdjrvi` + `TS0601` (already supported) |

## Cluster Analysis

| Endpoint | Input Clusters | Output Clusters | Device ID |
|----------|---------------|----------------|-----------|
| **1** | 0x0004 (Groups), 0x0005 (Scenes), **0xEF00 (Tuya DP)**, 0x0000 (Basic) | 0x0019 (OTA), 0x000A (Time) | 81 (0x0051) |
| **242** | (none) | 0x0021 (Green Power) | 97 (0x0061) |

## Key Observations

1. **Cluster 0xEF00 present** → Tuya DP protocol device (TS0601)
2. **Identical to existing** `_TZE200_r0jdjrvi` → Same cluster structure, same behavior
3. **ApplicationDeviceId: 81** → Window covering device type
4. **Power source: Mains** → Router device, not sleepy
5. **Green Power endpoint 242** → Standard Tuya endpoint

## Recommended Action

| Action | Details |
|--------|---------|
| **Driver** | `curtain_motor` (existing) |
| **Change** | Add `_TZE204_r0jdjrvi` to `manufacturerName[]` in `driver.compose.json` |
| **No new code needed** | Cluster structure is identical to existing `_TZE200_r0jdjrvi` |
| **Priority** | Low (simple fingerprint addition) |

## Verification Checklist

- [x] Device is TS0601 (Tuya DP protocol)
- [x] Cluster 0xEF00 present on endpoint 1
- [x] Identical to existing supported variant
- [x] No new DP mappings needed
- [x] No new capabilities needed
- [x] No new flow cards needed
